problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
